'''âp-b-r''' ('''pabara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wand|wand]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wand|wand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-b-r
|-
! Lemma
| pabara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pabarithi|pabarithi]] || [[word:pabariji|pabariji]] || [[word:pabarishi|pabarishi]] || [[word:pabari|pabari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pabaruthuth|pabaruthuth]] || [[word:pabarujuj|pabarujuj]] || [[word:pabarushush|pabarushush]] || [[word:pabar|pabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pabaruthu|pabaruthu]] || [[word:pabaruju|pabaruju]] || [[word:pabarushu|pabarushu]] || [[word:pabaru|pabaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pabarufuth|pabarufuth]] || [[word:pabarufuj|pabarufuj]] || [[word:pabarufush|pabarufush]] || [[word:pabaruf|pabaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pabarethe|pabarethe]] || [[word:pabareje|pabareje]] || [[word:pabareshe|pabareshe]] || [[word:pabare|pabare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pabarothoth|pabarothoth]] || [[word:pabarojoj|pabarojoj]] || [[word:pabaroshosh|pabaroshosh]] || [[word:pabar|pabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pabarotho|pabarotho]] || [[word:pabarojo|pabarojo]] || [[word:pabarosho|pabarosho]] || [[word:pabaro|pabaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pabarofoth|pabarofoth]] || [[word:pabarofoj|pabarofoj]] || [[word:pabarofosh|pabarofosh]] || [[word:pabarof|pabarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pabarĂŠthĂŠ|pabarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pabarĂŠjĂŠ|pabarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pabarĂŠshĂŠ|pabarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pabarĂŠ|pabarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pabarathath|pabarathath]] || [[word:pabarajaj|pabarajaj]] || [[word:pabarashash|pabarashash]] || [[word:pabar|pabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pabaratha|pabaratha]] || [[word:pabaraja|pabaraja]] || [[word:pabarasha|pabarasha]] || [[word:pabara|pabara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pabarafath|pabarafath]] || [[word:pabarafaj|pabarafaj]] || [[word:pabarafash|pabarafash]] || [[word:pabaraf|pabaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pabarasha|pabarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopabarasha|gopabarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipabarasha|gokipabarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pabarnĂŒsha|pabarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopabarnknĂŒsha|gopabarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipabarnĂŒsha|gokipabarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pabarshĂ«sha|pabarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopabarnkshĂ«sha|gopabarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipabarshĂ«sha|gokipabarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pabarosha|pabarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopabarnkrosha|gopabarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipabarosha|gokipabarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pabarmusha|pabarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopabarnkmusha|gopabarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabarmusha|gokipabarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pabarsherasha|pabarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopabarnksherasha|gopabarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipabarsherasha|gokipabarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pabarngasha|pabarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopabarnkngasha|gopabarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipabarngasha|gokipabarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pabaryasha|pabaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopabarnkyasha|gopabarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipabaryasha|gokipabaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pabaryamasha|pabaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopabarnkyamasha|gopabarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipabaryamasha|gokipabaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pabarnĂŒshĂ«sha|pabarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopabarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopabarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipabarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipabarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pabarnĂŒrosha|pabarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopabarnknĂŒrosha|gopabarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipabarnĂŒrosha|gokipabarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabarnĂŒmusha|pabarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopabarnknĂŒmusha|gopabarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabarnĂŒmusha|gokipabarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pabarshĂ«nĂŒsha|pabarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopabarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopabarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipabarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipabarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pabarshĂ«rosha|pabarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopabarnkshĂ«rosha|gopabarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipabarshĂ«rosha|gokipabarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabarshĂ«musha|pabarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopabarnkshĂ«musha|gopabarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabarshĂ«musha|gokipabarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pabaronĂŒsha|pabaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopabarnkronĂŒsha|gopabarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipabaronĂŒsha|gokipabaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pabaroshĂ«sha|pabaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopabarnkroshĂ«sha|gopabarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipabaroshĂ«sha|gokipabaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabaromusha|pabaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopabarnkromusha|gopabarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabaromusha|gokipabaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pabarmunĂŒsha|pabarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopabarnkmunĂŒsha|gopabarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipabarmunĂŒsha|gokipabarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pabarmushĂ«sha|pabarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopabarnkmushĂ«sha|gopabarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipabarmushĂ«sha|gokipabarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pabarmurosha|pabarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopabarnkmurosha|gopabarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipabarmurosha|gokipabarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pabar|pabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠr|pĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopabar|hopabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠbĂŠr|hopĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopabar|hohopabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠbĂŠr|hohopĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpabar|nĂŒpabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠbĂŠr|nĂŒpĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpabar|nĂŒnĂŒpabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠbĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpabar|nĂŻpabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠbĂŠr|nĂŻpĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpabar|nĂŻnĂŻpabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠbĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupabar|lupabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠbĂŠr|lupĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupabar|lulupabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠbĂŠr|lulupĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipabar|lipabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠbĂŠr|lipĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipabar|lilipabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠbĂŠr|lilipĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopabar|kopabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠbĂŠr|kopĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopabar|kokopabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠbĂŠr|kokopĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepabar|kepabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠbĂŠr|kepĂŠbĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepabar|kekepabar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠbĂŠr|kekepĂŠbĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
